title: Crispy Festive Festive Middle Eastern Cream Cheese Corn-Husk-Wrapped Whipped Cream Pie
description: A funky, crispy, festive middle-eastern dish featuring whipping cream, dairy-free-friendly, wrapped in corn husks and baked into a pie. Perfect for any celebration.
instructions: Mix cream cheese and whipped cream together in a bowl until smooth. Add pickle relish and mix well.
Divide the mixture into small portions for each corn husk wrapper.
Place a portion of filling onto each corn husk, then fold and wrap with the husk to form a mini pie shape.
Flatten wrapped pies slightly with your hands to help them rise during baking. Place on a greased baking sheet or tray.
Sprinkle flour over the tops of the pies to prevent sticking and for an extra crispy texture.
Bake in preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until golden brown and crisp.
Serve warm as is, or with a side of your favorite fruit dip for a festive treat.
